summary: Iteration 36 - MANUTRIX Bloco A Sobressalentes Avançado (condicoes/origem/quantidade_total + reformas history) VALIDATED end-to-end. Backend pytest 9/9 PASS. Frontend Playwright confirms cards show origem label (e.g. 'Compra Nova') + condition badges (Novo:1, Reformado:1, Em Reforma:1) + Qtd badge (e.g. 'Qtd: 3') directly in listing without opening record. Reforma wrench button opens 'Reformas — SP-XXXX' modal; reforma-empresa + reforma-submit work and produce 'Reforma registrada!' toast. Existing 'Reformatec Ltda' history visible in modal. NOVO button opens Create modal with Origem <select> (compra_nova/reforma_interna/reforma_externa/transferencia options) and all 6 condicao-* inputs (novo/reformado/em_reforma/reservado/instalado/descartado) and live 'Total: 0' counter.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:1987-1988 — quantidade_total computed as sum(condicoes.values()) at create; default condicoes dict provided with all 6 keys at 0 — clean ✓

server.py:2009-2010 — Update path only recomputes quantidade_total if condicoes provided AND truthy. If a client wants to zero ALL condicoes (empty dict) it would NOT recalc — minor edge case but acceptable since {} would be falsy. Consider 'if condicoes is not None' for stricter semantics.
server.py:1995 — audit_log uses f-string with data.nome which is Optional[str]. When nome=None the log shows 'Sobressalente: SP-XXXX None'. Cosmetic only.

server.py:2032-2057 — POST reformas endpoint takes raw 'body: dict' without Pydantic model — works but no validation on empresa_reparadora (required field can be empty string). Recommend ReformaCreate model with empresa_reparadora: str (min_length=1).

server.py:2059-2064 — DELETE reforma soft-deletes but does NOT filter by spare_id in the update_one, only by reforma id. Minor — paths still scoped per route but a malicious caller with reforma_id could delete via wrong spare_id path. Recommend: update_one({'id': reforma_id, 'spare_id': spare_id}, ...).
App.js:5126-5128 — Condition badges rendered only when value>0 — keeps cards compact ✓
App.js:5107 — qtTotal falls back to client-side sum when quantidade_total missing — defensive, good ✓
App.js:5137 — reforma-spare-{id} wrench button data-testid matches spec ✓
seed_data_creation: Tests create+delete TEST_iter36_* spares and TEST_PLAYWRIGHT_Reforma_LTDA reforma on SP-002144. Backend fixtures clean up via DELETE in yield teardown. The reforma TEST_PLAYWRIGHT_Reforma_LTDA on SP-002144 remains in DB (soft-deleted ones from test class also remain as soft-deleted); main agent may purge if needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: To re-run backend: `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://procure-manutrix.preview.emergentagent.com pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration36_spares_advanced.py -v`. The audit-logs endpoint is /api/admin/audit-logs (NOT /api/audit-logs). SpareAssetCreate model has BOTH 'nome' (Optional) and 'descricao' — Bloco A flow uses 'descricao' as the primary label; 'nome' is referenced by audit_log f-string at server.py:1995 only. Existing seed spare SP-002144 (Redutor Falk 500) and SP-DE904C both have condicoes={novo:1,reformado:1,em_reforma:1} and origem='compra_nova' for visual verification in listing.
rca of the issue: N/A — Bloco A (condicoes + origem + reformas) fully implemented and verified. No regressions observed. Backend tests 9/9 PASS, frontend visual verification PASS for cards, create modal, reforma modal, and reforma submission flow.
